question: The line chart shows sales trends from 1924 to 2024. What is the main difficulty in interpreting detailed changes in this chart?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is hard to read specific values and subtle trend changes accurately.
options.B: Sales clearly declined from 1970 to 1980 before rising again.
options.C: Sales remained exactly the same throughout the entire period.
options.D: The chart shows precise year-by-year fluctuations that are easy to distinguish.

explanation: The data shows a decline from 1960 to 1970, then a rise. Small text size can make it difficult to identify which decade had the decline.
